description_long: This sculpture depicts a mythological figure with a humanoid body and the head of a bird or monkey, standing in a dynamic, crouched pose atop an oval pedestal. The figure has six arms, each positioned differently, with one hand holding a circular object and others gesturing expressively. The body is adorned with intricate patterns, suggesting armor or ceremonial attire, and the legs are bent as if in mid-motion. The facial features are exaggerated, with a wide-open mouth and prominent eyes, conveying a sense of energy or aggression. The surface of the sculpture is textured, with visible details on the limbs, torso, and headdress. The entire piece appears to be cast in a dark, metallic material, giving it a weathered, ancient appearance.
description: A dynamic, multi-armed mythological figure with a bird or monkey-like head, standing on an oval pedestal and cast in dark metal with intricate detailing.
description_view_0: Frontal view showing the expressive face, six arms in various poses, and detailed chest and leg patterns.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the profile of the head, the curvature of the arms, and the layered base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back details, the arrangement of the arms, and the figure's tail or back adornment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the side of the face, arm gestures, and the figure's stance on the pedestal.
attribute_subject_matter: mythological multi-armed figure with animalistic features
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
